Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment

Class NecrifyKick

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.AbstractPunishment
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.NecrifyKick
All Implemented Interfaces:
Kick, Punishment, ReasonHolder
Direct Known Subclasses:
VelocityKick
public abstract class NecrifyKick extends AbstractPunishment implements Kick

  • Method Details

    • getType

      @NotNull public @NotNull PunishmentType getType()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns the type of this punishment. By default, this is a field from StandardPunishmentType.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the type of this punishment
      See Also:
      • StandardPunishmentType

    • createFullReason

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component createFullReason(Locale locale)
      Description copied from interface: ReasonHolder
      Creates the full reason inclusive when the ban ends (or that the ban is permanent).
      Specified by:
      createFullReason in interface ReasonHolder
      Parameters:
      locale - the locale to use for the reason (or null for the default locale); current behavior is not using this.
      Returns:
      the full reason with all information.
